naturalMeaning: 推动事情落地，把事情办成，强调执行力
example: He's really good at getting things done.
exampleTranslation: 他特别擅长推进事情落地。

example: Have you made any progress on the migration?
exampleTranslation: 迁移工作有进展了吗？

naturalMeaning: 产生实质性变化或影响
example: This refactor isn't going to move the needle on performance.
exampleTranslation: 这个重构对性能不会有实质影响。

naturalMeaning: 快速高效地完成一系列任务
example: Let's knock out these bugs before lunch.
exampleTranslation: 午饭前把这些bug快速搞定吧。

example: I just need to crank out this report before the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 我需要在开会前赶紧把这个报告赶出来。

naturalMeaning: 持续小步推进，慢慢减少工作量
example: I've been chipping away at the backlog all week.
exampleTranslation: 我这周一直在一点点清积压的任务。

example: What do we need to push this forward?
exampleTranslation: 我们需要什么来推动这件事？

example: Let's get the ball rolling on the Q3 planning.
exampleTranslation: 我们开始推动Q3的规划吧。

example: We finally made headway on the API redesign.
exampleTranslation: 我们终于在设计API这件事上取得了进展。

example: You need to stay on top of your tickets.
exampleTranslation: 你得及时跟进自己的任务单。

example: Let's keep things moving — we have a hard deadline.
exampleTranslation: 我们保持推进节奏——有硬性截止日期。

example: Let me wrap things up and I'll see you at the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 我把手头收个尾，会上见。

example: I need another day to tie up loose ends on the project.
exampleTranslation: 我还需要一天来处理项目的收尾细节。

example: There's no shortcut — you just have to put in the work.
exampleTranslation: 没有捷径，你就得真正下功夫。

naturalMeaning: 推动事情成真、有执行力
example: She's the one who makes things happen around here.
exampleTranslation: 她是这儿真正推动事情落地的人。

example: We need to pick up the pace if we're going to ship on time.
exampleTranslation: 如果想按时发布，我们得加快速度了。

naturalMeaning: 尽自己的本分，完成分内工作
example: Everyone needs to pull their weight on this team.
exampleTranslation: 在这个团队里每个人都得尽好自己的本分。

example: How do we stay on track with the roadmap?
exampleTranslation: 我们怎么确保按路线图推进？

example: Alright, let's get down to business.
exampleTranslation: 好了，我们开始谈正事吧。

naturalMeaning: 快速上手进入状态，不需要适应期
example: We need someone who can hit the ground running.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要一个能快速上手的人。

naturalMeaning: 保持已有的势头和节奏
example: We're making good progress — let's keep the momentum going.
exampleTranslation: 我们进展不错，保持这个势头。

naturalMeaning: 不计较方式，最终完成工作
example: I don't care how you do it, just get the job done.
exampleTranslation: 我不在乎你怎么做，把活干完就行。

naturalMeaning: 付出额外努力，超出预期
example: He always goes the extra mile for his clients.
exampleTranslation: 他对客户总是付出额外的努力。

example: You're going to need to step up your game if you want that promotion.
exampleTranslation: 想要升职的话你得提升表现了。

example: I need to buckle down and finish this sprint.
exampleTranslation: 我得埋头把这个冲刺干完。

example: The last few weeks were tough, but we ground it out.
exampleTranslation: 最后几周很难，但我们硬扛下来了。

naturalMeaning: 在日程中预留专门的时间
example: I blocked off two hours this morning for deep work.
exampleTranslation: 我今早预留了两个小时做深度工作。

naturalMeaning: 追赶因延误浪费的时间
example: We're behind schedule, so we need to make up for lost time.
exampleTranslation: 我们落后了，得把耽误的时间赶回来。

naturalMeaning: 提前应对，避免问题发生
example: Let's get ahead of this before it becomes a bigger issue.
exampleTranslation: 我们趁它还没变成大问题之前提前处理。

example: We need to stay ahead of the curve on security.
exampleTranslation: 在安全方面我们需要保持领先。

example: Let me check in with the team to see where we're at.
exampleTranslation: 我和团队确认一下目前进展。

example: Did you follow up on that bug report from last week?
exampleTranslation: 上周那个bug报告你跟进了吗？

example: Let's circle back on this after the demo.
exampleTranslation: Demo演示之后我们再回头讨论这个。

naturalMeaning: 短暂沟通联系，同步信息
example: I just wanted to touch base before the end of the week.
exampleTranslation: 我就想在这周结束前跟你碰一下。

naturalMeaning: 把某人拉入讨论或通知链
example: Let me loop Sarah in on this conversation.
exampleTranslation: 我把Sarah拉进这个讨论。

example: I'll reach out to the design team and get back to you.
exampleTranslation: 我会联系设计团队然后回复你。

example: I just want to flag that the deadline is next Friday.
exampleTranslation: 我想提醒一下截止日期是下周五。

example: I'm glad you brought that up — I was thinking the same thing.
exampleTranslation: 很高兴你提出这个——我也是这么想的。

literalTranslation: 把某事从某人那儿跑一遍
naturalMeaning: 向某人征求意见或过目
example: Let me run this proposal by you before I send it.
exampleTranslation: 我发之前先给你过一下这份提案。

example: I'll look into it and get back to you by end of day.
exampleTranslation: 我查一下，今天下班前回复你。

example: Ping me when the build finishes.
exampleTranslation: 构建完成了ping我一下。

example: Shoot me a message when you're free.
exampleTranslation: 你有空了给我发个消息。

naturalMeaning: 给某人同步信息、告知情况
example: Can you fill me in on what I missed?
exampleTranslation: 你能给我补一下我漏掉的信息吗？

naturalMeaning: 补上落下的信息或工作
example: I need to catch up on my emails.
exampleTranslation: 我需要补一下邮件。

naturalMeaning: 持续告知某人最新情况
example: Keep me posted on how the deployment goes.
exampleTranslation: 部署进展随时告诉我。

naturalMeaning: 提前告知某人，打声招呼
example: Just giving you a heads up — the boss wants to see you later.
exampleTranslation: 提前跟你说一声——老板待会想见你。

example: Let me know if you need any help.
exampleTranslation: 如果需要帮忙告诉我。

example: I haven't heard back from the client yet.
exampleTranslation: 我还没收到客户的回复。

example: I'd like to hear what everyone weighs in on this.
exampleTranslation: 我想听听大家的意见。

example: Feel free to chime in if you have something to add.
exampleTranslation: 有补充的随时插话。

example: Can I bounce some ideas off you?
exampleTranslation: 我能跟你聊几个想法吗？

example: Let me walk you through the new feature.
exampleTranslation: 我来给你演示一遍新功能。

example: Let's go over the sprint goals one more time.
exampleTranslation: 我们再过一遍冲刺目标。

example: Keep me in the loop when anything changes.
exampleTranslation: 有任何变化随时让我知情。

example: I'll pass that along to the engineering team.
exampleTranslation: 我会转达给工程团队。

example: I'll check back in with you next week.
exampleTranslation: 我下周再跟你确认。

example: He said he'd fix it but he never followed through.
exampleTranslation: 他说会修，但从来没跟到底。

example: We need to get the word out about the new policy.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要把新政策传达出去。

example: Let's talk it through over coffee.
exampleTranslation: 我们喝咖啡的时候详细聊一下。

naturalMeaning: 提出想法看大家的反应
example: Let's run it up the flagpole and see who salutes.
exampleTranslation: 我们抛出这个想法看看大家的反应。

example: I just want to make sure we're on the same page.
exampleTranslation: 我就想确认一下我们的理解是一致的。

example: Let's have a quick sync to get on the same page.
exampleTranslation: 我们快速同步一下，对齐理解。

example: We don't always see eye to eye, but we respect each other.
exampleTranslation: 我们看法不一定总一致，但互相尊重。

naturalMeaning: 同意、支持某个决定或计划
example: Is everyone on board with the new timeline?
exampleTranslation: 大家都同意新的时间表吗？

example: We need to make sure we're aligned on the priorities.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要确保在优先级上对齐。

naturalMeaning: 认同并接受某个想法或方向
example: The team has really bought into the new vision.
exampleTranslation: 团队已经真正认同了新愿景。

example: Has the manager signed off on the budget?
exampleTranslation: 经理批准预算了吗？

example: We've been given the green light to start the project.
exampleTranslation: 我们已获批准启动这个项目。

example: The build is good to go for production.
exampleTranslation: 构建已经就绪，可以上线了。

example: We're all set for the demo tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 明天的演示我们都准备好了。

example: That makes sense — let's go with that approach.
exampleTranslation: 说得通——我们就按这个方案来。

example: Got it, I'll update the ticket right away.
exampleTranslation: 收到，我马上去更新工单。

example: Is everything crystal clear or do you have questions?
exampleTranslation: 一切都非常清楚了吗，还是有疑问？

example: Sounds good, let me know when the PR is ready.
exampleTranslation: 好的，PR准备好了告诉我。

example: If Thursday works for everyone, it works for me.
exampleTranslation: 如果周四大家都可以，我也没问题。

example: If you want to push it to next week, that's fine by me.
exampleTranslation: 如果你想推到下周，我没意见。

naturalMeaning: 说得通、合理（口语新用法）
example: He said he was overloaded? Yeah, that tracks.
exampleTranslation: 他说他忙不过来？嗯，说得通。

example: I'm with you on that — we should invest in testing.
exampleTranslation: 我同意你——我们应该在测试上投入。

example: We're on the same wavelength — I was thinking the same thing.
exampleTranslation: 我们想法很合拍——我也是这么想的。

example: We're good — the tests all pass now.
exampleTranslation: 没问题了——测试都过了。

example: No issues there, go ahead and merge it.
exampleTranslation: 没问题，合并吧。

example: Is everything working now? Yeah, all good.
exampleTranslation: 现在都正常了吗？嗯，没问题了。

example: Okay, you've sold me — let's go with your plan.
exampleTranslation: 好吧，你说服我了——按你的方案来。

example: Hey, we're on the same team here — let's figure this out together.
exampleTranslation: 咱们是一个团队的——一起搞定这件事。

example: We're all in agreement that this is the right move.
exampleTranslation: 我们都一致同意这是正确的做法。

example: Is the client on board with the timeline change?
exampleTranslation: 客户同意时间表变更吗？

example: How's the new setup working out? No complaints here.
exampleTranslation: 新配置用得怎么样？没啥可抱怨的。

example: Fair enough, I see your point.
exampleTranslation: 有道理，我明白你的意思了。

example: Say no more, I'll take care of it.
exampleTranslation: 懂了，我来处理。

example: Good, so we're all on the same page about the next steps.
exampleTranslation: 很好，所以我们对下一步的理解都一致了。

example: We ran into an issue with the database migration.
exampleTranslation: 我们在数据库迁移时遇到了问题。

example: Let's figure out why the build is failing.
exampleTranslation: 我们来查查构建为什么失败。

example: We need to sort out the deployment pipeline first.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要先搞定部署管道。

example: We'll work through the edge cases one by one.
exampleTranslation: 我们会逐一解决边界情况。

example: I'll deal with the server timeout issue.
exampleTranslation: 我来处理服务器超时的问题。

example: Don't worry about the config — I'll take care of it.
exampleTranslation: 别担心配置的事——我来搞定。

example: Can you look into why the API is slow?
exampleTranslation: 你能查一下API为什么慢吗？

example: I need to dig into the logs to find the root cause.
exampleTranslation: 我需要深挖日志找到根本原因。

naturalMeaning: 聚焦到具体问题或目标
example: Let's zero in on what's causing the performance drop.
exampleTranslation: 我们聚焦到到底是什么导致性能下降。

example: We narrowed it down to three possible causes.
exampleTranslation: 我们把它缩小到三个可能的原因。

naturalMeaning: 追查到底、找出根本原因
example: We need to get to the bottom of this outage.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要把这次宕机的原因查到底。

example: I spent all morning troubleshooting the network issue.
exampleTranslation: 我花了一整个上午排查网络问题。

example: We need to patch things up with the client after that mistake.
exampleTranslation: 那次失误之后我们需要和客户修复关系。

example: Let me talk to them and smooth things over.
exampleTranslation: 我去跟他们聊聊，缓和一下局面。

example: We can work around the limitation by using a different library.
exampleTranslation: 我们可以通过用另一个库来绕过这个限制。

naturalMeaning: 在没有理想条件的情况下凑合使用
example: We'll have to make do with what we have for now.
exampleTranslation: 我们暂时只能拿现有的凑合用了。

example: I messed up the deployment — had to roll back.
exampleTranslation: 我把部署搞砸了——不得不回滚。

example: If I screw this up, I'm going to hear about it.
exampleTranslation: 要是我搞砸了，肯定要被说教一通。

naturalMeaning: 出大问题、爆发（冲突或事故）
example: The production issue blew up while I was on leave.
exampleTranslation: 我休假的时候线上问题爆发了。

example: Everything was fine until the deployment went south.
exampleTranslation: 部署出问题之前一切正常。

example: We hit a snag with the third-party API integration.
exampleTranslation: 我们在第三方API集成上遇到了一个小问题。

example: We hit a roadblock with the database schema changes.
exampleTranslation: 我们在数据库表结构变更上遇到了严重阻碍。

example: I don't know how yet, but we'll make it work.
exampleTranslation: 我还不知道怎么做，但我们会搞定的。

example: I can't believe we pulled off the launch on time.
exampleTranslation: 真不敢相信我们按时完成了上线。

example: The new team lead really turned things around.
exampleTranslation: 新的团队负责人真的扭转了局面。

naturalMeaning: 问题自然解决、不用过度干预
example: Don't stress too much — it'll work itself out.
exampleTranslation: 别太焦虑——事情会自然解决的。

naturalMeaning: 紧急处理各种突发问题
example: I spent the whole day putting out fires.
exampleTranslation: 我一整天都在处理各种突发状况。

naturalMeaning: 对问题进行优先级分类和初步处理
example: Let's triage the bugs and tackle the critical ones first.
exampleTranslation: 我们把bug分个优先级，先处理关键的。

example: The project is coming apart at the seams.
exampleTranslation: 这个项目快要全面崩溃了。

naturalMeaning: 临时凑合解决、治标不治本
example: We're just putting a band-aid on it — we need a proper fix.
exampleTranslation: 我们只是在临时凑合——需要一个真正的解决方案。

example: Let's weigh the options before making a decision.
exampleTranslation: 做决定前我们先权衡一下选项。

example: Let's list out the pros and cons of each approach.
exampleTranslation: 我们把每种方案的利弊列出来。

example: There's always a trade-off between speed and quality.
exampleTranslation: 速度和质量之间总是需要权衡取舍。

example: I think we should go with the React-based solution.
exampleTranslation: 我觉得我们应该用基于React的方案。

example: We settled on a microservices architecture after weeks of debate.
exampleTranslation: 经过几周的争论，我们最终选定了微服务架构。

example: We've decided to move forward with the new design.
exampleTranslation: 我们决定推进新设计方案。

example: We're ready to pull the trigger on the acquisition.
exampleTranslation: 我们已经准备好拍板这个收购了。

example: Someone needs to make a call — we can't keep debating.
exampleTranslation: 得有人做决定了——我们不能一直讨论下去。

example: Let's call it — we'll go with option A.
exampleTranslation: 定了——我们就选A方案。

example: We need to nail down the exact requirements first.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要先敲定具体的需求。

example: Let's lock in the meeting for Tuesday at 2pm.
exampleTranslation: 我们把会议锁定在周二下午2点。

example: If you think it's the right move, go for it.
exampleTranslation: 如果你觉得是对的，那就放手去做。

example: I've never used that framework before, but I'll give it a shot.
exampleTranslation: 我从来没用过那个框架，但我会试试。

naturalMeaning: 下决心做一件有风险或重大的事情
example: We finally took the plunge and rewrote the frontend.
exampleTranslation: 我们终于下决心重写了前端。

example: Have you decided on a database yet?
exampleTranslation: 你选好数据库了吗？

example: I'm leaning towards using PostgreSQL for this project.
exampleTranslation: 我倾向于在这个项目上用PostgreSQL。

example: I'm still on the fence about switching to microservices.
exampleTranslation: 我对是否切换到微服务还在犹豫。

example: We don't have a fixed plan yet — let's play it by ear.
exampleTranslation: 我们还没有固定计划——看情况再定。

example: Let's try the new process and see how it goes.
exampleTranslation: 我们先试一下新流程看看情况。

example: Let's focus on the MVP first — we'll cross that bridge later.
exampleTranslation: 先专注于MVP——那个问题我们到时候再说。

naturalMeaning: 临时做决定、不提前规划
example: We can't just decide on the fly — we need a real plan.
exampleTranslation: 我们不能临时拍脑袋做决定——需要真正的计划。

naturalMeaning: 退后一步、从全局角度看
example: Let's take a step back and look at the bigger picture.
exampleTranslation: 我们退一步，从全局角度来看一下。

example: You're stressing about one bug — look at the big picture.
exampleTranslation: 你在纠结一个bug——看看全局。

example: This project isn't going anywhere — time to cut our losses.
exampleTranslation: 这个项目没有进展——该止损了。

expression: go back to the drawing board
example: The user research shows this doesn't work — back to the drawing board.
exampleTranslation: 用户研究表明这个行不通——推翻重来。

example: You can't just pick and choose which requirements to follow.
exampleTranslation: 你不能只挑你想做的需求来做。

example: I'm trying to decide between AWS and GCP for hosting.
exampleTranslation: 我在AWS和GCP之间做选择。

example: We need to commit to a deadline so the team can plan.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要确定一个截止日期，团队好做规划。

example: You can't sit on the fence forever — we need your input.
exampleTranslation: 你不能一直骑墙——我们需要你的意见。

example: Let me sleep on it and get back to you tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 我今晚想一下，明天回复你。

example: We're going to have to work overtime to meet the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 我们得加班才能赶上截止日期。

example: We submitted at 4:58 — that was cutting it close.
exampleTranslation: 我们4:58才提交——时间真是够紧的。

example: It came down to the wire, but we shipped on time.
exampleTranslation: 最后一刻才搞定，但我们还是按时发布了。

example: This is a tight deadline, but I think we can make it.
exampleTranslation: 时间很紧，但我认为我们能赶上。

example: We're ahead of schedule, so we can take our time.
exampleTranslation: 我们进度提前了，所以不用着急。

example: We're behind schedule because of the API integration issues.
exampleTranslation: 因为API集成的问题，我们进度落后了。

example: The project is on schedule for a Q4 release.
exampleTranslation: 项目按计划在Q4发布。

example: We had to push back the release by two weeks.
exampleTranslation: 我们不得不把发布日期推迟两周。

example: Can we move up the sprint review to Tuesday?
exampleTranslation: 我们能把冲刺评审提前到周二吗？

example: We're putting the feature on hold until next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 我们把这个功能暂缓到下个季度。

example: The code review has been dragging on for days.
exampleTranslation: 这个代码评审已经拖了好几天了。

example: We need to buy some time while the backend team fixes this.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要争取一些时间等后端团队修复这个问题。

example: The patch arrived in the nick of time before the outage.
exampleTranslation: 补丁在宕机前最后一刻赶到了。

naturalMeaning: 冲刺期、最忙最紧张的时候
example: It's crunch time — we're shipping next week.
exampleTranslation: 现在是冲刺期——我们下周发布。

example: I had to pull an all-nighter to get the demo ready.
exampleTranslation: 我不得不通宵把演示准备好。

example: The team is on a roll — three clean sprints in a row.
exampleTranslation: 团队状态正佳——连续三个冲刺零故障。

naturalMeaning: 进入心流状态、高度专注
example: Don't bother me when I'm in the zone.
exampleTranslation: 我进入状态的时候别打扰我。

example: I have back-to-back meetings all morning.
exampleTranslation: 我一上午都是连轴会议。

example: The client needs a quick turnaround on this request.
exampleTranslation: 客户需要对这个请求快速响应。

example: I can squeeze in a quick review before lunch.
exampleTranslation: 我可以在午饭前挤出时间快速做个评审。

example: We're in a time crunch, so let's keep the meeting short.
exampleTranslation: 我们时间很紧，所以会议简短一点。

example: Take your time — accuracy is more important than speed here.
exampleTranslation: 别着急——这里准确比速度更重要。

example: We ran out of time before we could finish the discussion.
exampleTranslation: 我们没时间了，讨论还没结束。

example: Let's set aside an hour on Friday for code review.
exampleTranslation: 周五留出一小时做代码评审。

example: Let's time box this discussion to 15 minutes.
exampleTranslation: 我们给这个讨论设定15分钟的时间盒。

example: We got sidetracked talking about the UI and forgot the main topic.
exampleTranslation: 我们聊UI聊跑题了，忘了主要话题。

example: The build pipeline takes forever to run.
exampleTranslation: 这个构建管道跑起来要花很长时间。

example: They approved the budget at the eleventh hour.
exampleTranslation: 他们在最后关头批准了预算。

example: Stop stalling on the review and just do it.
exampleTranslation: 别再拖评审了，赶紧做了吧。

example: What's the typical turnaround time for a PR review?
exampleTranslation: PR评审通常的周转时间是多久？

example: If you put in the effort, the results will show.
exampleTranslation: 如果你付出了努力，结果会体现出来的。

example: This is the biggest launch of the year — give it your all.
exampleTranslation: 这是今年最重要的发布——全力以赴。

naturalMeaning: 不留任何余地、尽一切可能
example: We left no stone unturned in our investigation of the bug.
exampleTranslation: 我们在排查这个bug时没有放过任何一个可能性。

example: The client is visiting tomorrow, so bring your A-game.
exampleTranslation: 客户明天来访，拿出你们的最佳表现。

example: The new designer really raised the bar for the whole team.
exampleTranslation: 新来的设计师真的提高了整个团队的标准。

example: We set the bar high for code quality in this project.
exampleTranslation: 这个项目我们设定了很高的代码质量标准。

example: Don't cut corners on testing just to save time.
exampleTranslation: 别为了省时间在测试上偷工减料。

example: If you're going to do it, don't half-ass it.
exampleTranslation: 要做就别敷衍了事。

example: Lately it feels like he's just phoning it in.
exampleTranslation: 最近感觉他就是在敷衍。

example: She went above and beyond to help the customer.
exampleTranslation: 她超越预期地帮助了客户。

example: The quality of your work has been top notch.
exampleTranslation: 你的工作质量一直是一流的。

example: The new deployment system is rock solid.
exampleTranslation: 新的部署系统非常稳定可靠。

example: We need to make the error handling bulletproof.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要让错误处理万无一失。

example: This library is battle tested in production at scale.
exampleTranslation: 这个库已经在生产环境中经过大规模实战检验。

example: Let's go with a tried and true approach rather than something experimental.
exampleTranslation: 我们用经过验证可靠的方法，不要搞试验性的。

example: Our uptime is best in class for our industry.
exampleTranslation: 我们的正常运行时间在行业内是同类最佳的。

example: Perfect is the enemy of done — this is good enough.
exampleTranslation: 完美是完成的敌人——这样够好了。

example: Does this code pass muster for production?
exampleTranslation: 这段代码达到上线标准了吗？

example: The final product didn't measure up to what was promised.
exampleTranslation: 最终产品没有达到承诺的标准。

example: The new version really lives up to the hype.
exampleTranslation: 新版本真的没有辜负大家的期待。

naturalMeaning: 经得起考验、保持良好状态
example: Let's see if the system holds up under load.
exampleTranslation: 我们看看系统在负载下能否撑住。

naturalMeaning: 站出来承担责任、加把劲
example: When the lead left, she stepped up and took over.
exampleTranslation: 组长离开后，她站出来接手了工作。

example: She set the standard for how code reviews should be done.
exampleTranslation: 她树立了代码评审应该怎么做的高标准。

example: The test coverage is not up to par for a production release.
exampleTranslation: 测试覆盖率没有达到上线发布的标准。

example: His attention to detail is a cut above the rest.
exampleTranslation: 他对细节的把控比其他人高出一等。

example: The feature works, but we need to polish it up before the demo.
exampleTranslation: 功能能用了，但演示前还需要打磨完善一下。

example: The prototype is still rough around the edges.
exampleTranslation: 原型还有一些不完善的地方。

naturalMeaning: 达到可以发布的质量水平
example: This code isn't ship quality yet — it needs more testing.
exampleTranslation: 这段代码还没达到可以发布的质量——还需要更多测试。

naturalMeaning: 过度追求完美、画蛇添足
example: Stop gold plating the features and just ship it.
exampleTranslation: 别再给功能画蛇添足了，直接发布吧。

example: The user experience feels like a really polished product.
exampleTranslation: 这个用户体验感觉是一个经过精心打磨的产品。

example: It was great catching up with you over lunch.
exampleTranslation: 午餐和你叙叙旧真的很开心。

naturalMeaning: 和某人一起玩或打发时间
example: I'm going to hang out with some coworkers after work.
exampleTranslation: 我下班后和几个同事出去聚聚。

naturalMeaning: 约人喝杯咖啡（通常是快速见面）
example: Want to grab coffee this afternoon and chat?
exampleTranslation: 下午想喝杯咖啡聊聊吗？

example: A few of us are grabbing lunch — want to join?
exampleTranslation: 我们几个人去吃午饭——要一起来吗？

example: Let's grab a bite before the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 开会前我们随便吃点东西。

example: We were just shooting the breeze before the meeting started.
exampleTranslation: 开会前我们就在闲聊。

example: I'm not great at small talk, but I'm trying to get better.
exampleTranslation: 我不太擅长寒暄，但我在努力改进。

example: Let's do a quick icebreaker to get people talking.
exampleTranslation: 我们做一个破冰活动让大家开始交流。

example: I'm still getting to know everyone on the team.
exampleTranslation: 我还在逐渐了解团队里的每个人。

naturalMeaning: 第一次见面就很合得来
example: We really hit it off at the team offsite.
exampleTranslation: 我们在团队团建上真的很合得来。

example: Even after changing jobs, we still keep in touch.
exampleTranslation: 即使换了工作，我们仍然保持联系。

example: Let's stay in touch — I'll add you on LinkedIn.
exampleTranslation: 咱们保持联系——我在LinkedIn上加你。

example: We lost touch after he moved to the West Coast.
exampleTranslation: 他搬到西海岸后我们就失去联系了。

example: Drop me a line when you're in town.
exampleTranslation: 你来城里的时候给我发个消息。

example: Hey, how's it going? Long time no see.
exampleTranslation: 嘿，最近怎么样？好久不见。

naturalMeaning: 怎么了/最近咋样（最常用口语问候）
example: Hey, what's up? Haven't seen you in a while.
exampleTranslation: 嘿，最近咋样？好一阵没见你了。

example: How have you been? I heard you switched teams.
exampleTranslation: 你最近怎么样？听说你换团队了。

example: Long time no see! How's the new job treating you?
exampleTranslation: 好久不见！新工作怎么样？

expression: what have you been up to
example: What have you been up to since we last talked?
exampleTranslation: 上次聊过之后你都在忙什么？

naturalMeaning: 别紧张/放松点/慢点（告别或安慰用语）
example: Alright, take it easy — I'll see you tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 好了，放轻松——明天见。

example: Thanks for your time, have a good one!
exampleTranslation: 谢谢你的时间，祝你愉快！

example: I'll probably see you around the office.
exampleTranslation: 我大概会在办公室见到你。

example: Alright, catch you later!
exampleTranslation: 好了，回头见！

example: Have a good weekend everyone! See you Monday.
exampleTranslation: 大家周末愉快！周一见。

example: We should get together for drinks sometime.
exampleTranslation: 我们改天应该一起喝一杯。

example: I'm looking forward to the team offsite next month.
exampleTranslation: 我很期待下个月的团建活动。

naturalMeaning: 见到你很高兴（告别时说）
example: Good seeing you, let's do this again soon.
exampleTranslation: 见到你真好，我们不久再聚。

naturalMeaning: 我的错/是我不好（口语道歉）
example: Oh, my bad — I didn't realize you were waiting.
exampleTranslation: 哦，我的错——我没意识到你在等。

naturalMeaning: 没关系/别担心（回应道歉）
example: No worries, mistakes happen.
exampleTranslation: 没关系，谁都会犯错。

example: Thank you so much for helping me debug that.
exampleTranslation: 非常感谢你帮我调试那个问题。

example: Let's kick off the meeting with a quick status update.
exampleTranslation: 我们用快速的状态更新来开启会议。

example: We have stand up every morning at 9:30.
exampleTranslation: 我们每天早上9:30开站会。

example: Let's sync up after lunch to review the progress.
exampleTranslation: 午饭后我们同步一下，回顾一下进展。

example: Let's huddle up real quick to discuss the production issue.
exampleTranslation: 我们快速碰一下讨论线上问题。

example: Let's brainstorm on ways to improve the onboarding experience.
exampleTranslation: 我们来集思广益改善新用户体验。

example: Who's going to run the meeting today?
exampleTranslation: 今天谁主持会议？

example: Let's table that discussion until we have more data.
exampleTranslation: 在得到更多数据之前我们先暂缓讨论那个。

naturalMeaning: 会议结束后再讨论某事
example: This is getting too detailed — let's take it offline.
exampleTranslation: 这个太细了——我们线下聊。

naturalMeaning: 先放一放、记录下来以后讨论
example: Let's put a pin in this and move on to the next topic.
exampleTranslation: 我们先把这个放一放，进入下一个话题。

example: Let's dive into the details of the implementation plan.
exampleTranslation: 我们来深入讨论实施计划的细节。

naturalMeaning: 深入探讨某个具体方面
example: Let's drill down on the performance metrics.
exampleTranslation: 我们来深入探讨性能指标。

naturalMeaning: 通过研讨来打磨或解决
example: Let's workshop the design proposal in tomorrow's meeting.
exampleTranslation: 明天会上我们来研讨打磨设计方案。

naturalMeaning: 在团队中推广并征求意见
example: I've been socializing the idea with different teams to get feedback.
exampleTranslation: 我一直在不同团队间推广这个想法并收集反馈。

naturalMeaning: 获得某人的支持与认可
example: We need buy in from the VP before we proceed.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要获得VP的支持才能继续。

example: Let's review the action items from last meeting.
exampleTranslation: 我们来回顾上次会议的行动项。

example: What are the next steps after this meeting?
exampleTranslation: 这次会议之后下一步是什么？

example: What were your key takeaways from the conference?
exampleTranslation: 你从会议中最大的收获是什么？

naturalMeaning: 搁置议题清单（会后另行讨论）
example: Let's put this in the parking lot and come back to it if we have time.
exampleTranslation: 先把这个放进停车场，有时间再回来看。

example: We need to rally the team and get everyone focused on the launch.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要把团队凝聚起来，集中精力在上线。

example: What unique skills do you bring to the table?
exampleTranslation: 你带来哪些独特的技能？

naturalMeaning: 让所有人都同意或参与
example: We need to get everyone on board before we make a final decision.
exampleTranslation: 在做最终决定前我们需要让所有人都同意。

example: I'll be heads down on this feature for the rest of the day.
exampleTranslation: 今天剩下的时间我会埋头做这个功能。

example: The presentation should have clear calls to action for the audience.
exampleTranslation: 演示报告应该有明确的行动呼吁。

example: We had a whiteboard session to design the new architecture.
exampleTranslation: 我们开了一个白板讨论会来设计新架构。

example: Now I'll open the floor for questions.
exampleTranslation: 现在开放提问环节。

example: Can you take the minutes of the meeting and share them out?
exampleTranslation: 你能做一下会议纪要和发出来吗？

example: What's on the agenda for today's meeting?
exampleTranslation: 今天会议的议程是什么？

example: Let's stay on agenda — we only have 30 minutes.
exampleTranslation: 我们按议程来——只有30分钟。

example: We need to get alignment from all stakeholders before proceeding.
exampleTranslation: 在继续之前我们需要所有干系人达成一致。

naturalMeaning: 让团队审阅或征求意见
example: Let me run it by the team before committing to the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 在承诺截止日期之前先让团队过一遍。

example: You absolutely nailed the presentation.
exampleTranslation: 你的演示简直太棒了。

example: The team crushed it on this release.
exampleTranslation: 团队这次发布做得非常出色。

example: You're killing it on the new project.
exampleTranslation: 你在新项目上做得太棒了。

expression: knock it out of the park
example: You really knocked it out of the park with the new UI.
exampleTranslation: 这个新UI你真的做得太出色了。

example: She aced the technical interview.
exampleTranslation: 她技术面试表现极其出色。

naturalMeaning: 成功完成任务、不负期望
example: I knew you'd come through — you always do.
exampleTranslation: 我就知道你能搞定——你一直是这样。

example: We need to deliver on what we promised the customer.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要兑现对客户的承诺。

example: The new feature exceeded everyone's expectations.
exampleTranslation: 新功能超出了所有人的预期。

example: The test coverage fell short of the 80% target.
exampleTranslation: 测试覆盖率没有达到80%的目标。

example: We came up short on our Q2 targets.
exampleTranslation: 我们第二季度的目标没有达到。

example: The initial design missed the mark with users.
exampleTranslation: 最初的设计没有满足用户的需求。

naturalMeaning: 失误、搞砸了应该做的事
example: I really dropped the ball on following up with that client.
exampleTranslation: 我在跟进那个客户的事情上真是掉链子了。

example: I don't want to let the team down by missing the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 我不想因为没赶上截止日期而让团队失望。

example: I had one chance and I blew it.
exampleTranslation: 我只有一次机会，结果搞砸了。

example: His performance just isn't cutting it — we need to talk to him.
exampleTranslation: 他的表现就是不行——我们需要和他谈谈。

example: I totally bombed the demo — the system crashed twice.
exampleTranslation: 我演示彻底搞砸了——系统崩溃了两次。

example: Is there any way to salvage the situation with the client?
exampleTranslation: 还有什么办法能挽回和客户的关系吗？

naturalMeaning: 在不利情况下尽量利用
example: The launch didn't go perfectly, but we'll make the best of it.
exampleTranslation: 发布不是很完美，但我们会尽量利用好现状。

example: The team bounced back after the failed release.
exampleTranslation: 团队在发布失败后重新振作了起来。

example: It took us a week to recover from the data loss.
exampleTranslation: 我们花了一周时间从数据丢失中恢复。

example: It's hard to come back from a failed product launch.
exampleTranslation: 产品发布失败后很难走出来。

example: He fixed the bug just before the demo to save face.
exampleTranslation: 他在演示前修好了bug来保住颜面。

example: The proposal went down in flames during the review.
exampleTranslation: 这个提案在评审中彻底被否定了。

example: I totally fumbled my answer during the interview.
exampleTranslation: 面试时我回答得完全语无伦次。

example: We struck out on three different vendors before finding one.
exampleTranslation: 我们在找到一家之前被三个供应商拒绝了。

naturalMeaning: 失败、完蛋（通常指公司或项目）
example: The startup went belly up after six months.
exampleTranslation: 这家初创公司六个月后就倒闭了。

naturalMeaning: 在关键时刻挽救了局面
example: Her quick thinking saved the day during the outage.
exampleTranslation: 她的快速反应在宕机时挽救了局面。

example: The team won big with the new product launch.
exampleTranslation: 团队在新产品发布上大获成功。

example: Despite the challenges, we came out on top.
exampleTranslation: 尽管有挑战，我们最终还是胜出了。

naturalMeaning: 最终证明自己是正确的
example: Everyone doubted our approach, but we got the last laugh.
exampleTranslation: 大家都质疑我们的方法，但我们笑到了最后。
